name: io.github.gateio-dev/gate-mcp
description: MCP server exposing the full Gate.com API v4 — spot, futures, delivery, margin, wallet, account, options, earn, and flash swap. Public market data works without credentials; trading and account tools activate when GATE_API_KEY and GATE_API_SECRET are set.

environmentVariables.name: GATE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Gate.com API key. Required for authenticated endpoints (trading, wallet, account).

environmentVariables.name: GATE_API_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Gate.com API secret. Required for authenticated endpoints (trading, wallet, account).

environmentVariables.name: GATE_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the Gate.com API base URL. Defaults to https://api.gateio.ws. Set to https://api-testnet.gateapi.io for testnet.
